Video.summary: The story of Aaron Winters, his wife Rosie and their discovery of borax in Death Valley.
Video.title: She Burns Green

Video.summary: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost Pegleg gold mine.
Video.title: The Lost Pegleg Mine

Video.summary: An embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress.
Video.title: Cynthy's Dream Dress

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A young Mormon wife takes drastic measures to cope with life on the prairie.
Video.title: Sego Lilies

Video.summary: An ostracized woman saves her town.
Video.title: The Diamond Babe

Video.summary: The town drunk Solomon asks the current newspaper owner to aid in his tall tales to his sister.
Video.title: Solomon in All His Glory

Video.summary: A territorial dispute threatens the border town of Aurora and a young couple's love.
Video.title: Which Side of the Fence?

Video.summary: Cavalry man Larry Brooks is escorting a group through peaceful Native territory when threats arise.
Video.title: One in a Hundred

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with ways to make it happen.
Video.title: Snowshoe Thompson

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: Lucretia's family endures years of poverty because her daydreaming husband hates steady work.
Video.title: The Rainbow Chaser

Video.summary: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.
Video.title: The Light on the Mountain

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.
Video.title: Death and Taxes

Video.summary: Miners become hostile when they suspect an assayer has cheated them with deceptive evaluations.
Video.title: The Mormon's Grindstone

Video.summary: A young bandit is robbing banks and businesses in a sheriff's territory.
Video.title: The Death Valley Kid

Video.summary: A young monk, on his way to the San Gabriel Mission, gets lost and ends up in Death Valley.
Video.title: The Bell of San Gabriel

Video.summary: Zack and Zeke, slaves from Louisville, seek to buy their freedom by digging for gold.
Video.title: Land of the Free

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: A young miner is afflicted with a monumental problem: claustrophobia.
Video.title: Yaller

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: A prospector tries to swindle a silver baron.
Video.title: Chicken Bill

Video.summary: The story of Sacajawea, the Native woman who helped explorers Lewis and Clark.
Video.title: The Girl Who Walked the West

Image.alt: The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West
The Girl Who Walked the West

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: A frontier couple battle Natives, outlaws and a government-issued land grant to save their ranch.
Video.title: Here Stands Bailey

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: The Chumash Natives, enslaved by Spanish soldiers in California, rebel against their captors.
Video.title: Let My People Go

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone
